title: schc/codec: repetitive decompress_* functions share boilerplate
description: In codec.rs, decompress_coap(), decompress_icmpv6_echo(), decompress_rpl_dio(), decompress_rpl_dao(), decompress_mqtt_sn() all share the same IPv6 header construction pattern (lines 526-536, 586-597, 658-669, etc). Consider extracting a helper like 'fn write_ipv6_header(out: &mut [u8], payload_len: u16, next_header: u8, hop_limit: u8, src: &[u8; 16], dst: &[u8; 16])' to reduce duplication.
